spells_mythic_shaman.title: Mythic Shaman Spells
description: *You have toggled Mythic feats and spells off on the [settings page](settings). You will need to toggle it back on in order to see them.*

data: Enemies take -1 on attack rolls and saves against fear.
Exist comfortably in hot or cold regions.
2d4 berries each cure 1 hp (max 8 hp/24 hours).
Grants +2 (or higher) enhancement to natural armor.
Magic weapon attacks on its own.
Use a Harrow deck to predict the future.
Hail deals 5d6 damage in cylinder 40 ft. across.
Creates a stone wall that can be shaped.
One or more plants animate and fight for you.
Subject's severed limbs grow back, cures 4d8 damage +1/level (max +35).
Storm rains acid, lightning, and hail.

spells_mythic_spiritualist.title: Mythic Spiritualist Spells
description: *You have toggled Mythic feats and spells off on the [settings page](settings). You will need to toggle it back on in order to see them.*

data: Exist comfortably in hot or cold regions.
Kills dying creature; you gain 1d8 temporary hp, +2 to Str, and +1 caster level.
Subject is invisible for 1 min./level or until it attacks.
Magic weapon attacks on its own.
Subject becomes insubstantial and can fly slowly.
One creature/level moves faster, receives +1 on attack rolls, AC, and Reflex saves.
Gives +2 on attack rolls, saves, skill checks.
One subject/level takes only one action/round, -1 to AC, Reflex saves, and attack rolls.
Fearsome illusion kills subject or deals 3d6 damage.
Moves object, attacks creature, or hurls object or creature.
Reduces one creature or object to dust.
Turns you invisible and creates illusory double.

Fling a fist-sized rock at your opponent, this rock can channel your ki.

Fire blinding rays of sunlight to blind enemies and damage those with sensitivity to light.
Kills dying creature; you gain 1d8 temporary hp, +2 to Str, and +1 caster level.
